title: Britannia Industries Asia Pacific Associates is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: Britannia Industries Asia Pacific Associates is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
We at Britannia Industries Asia Pacific Associates are looking for an experienced Quality Control Engineer based out of Madurai. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Britannia Industries Asia Pacific Associates:
Britannia Industries Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in PPAP

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Flexible working hours
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Professional development and training programs
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Madurai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Britannia Industries Asia Pacific Associates!
